breaking_news_suggestions.headline: WIN-043 Gets Three-Counter Defense Neutralization — W019 Internal Contradiction Surfaced
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome's North Magnetic Pole drift ratio claim (2.26×) now has a structured defender-pivot rebuttal: (1) reproducing a number from NOAA's public dataset IS the post-hoc objection, not a defense; (2) the dome's own W019 prediction reports 5.5× for the same asymmetry — a 2.4× internal contradiction; (3) the H(r) field equation's radial symmetry makes longitude-dependent ratios structurally inaccessible. Detail_extra also added with forward falsification flag (PRED-R004).
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Closes a major defense gap (defense_survives=3 from c3 review) with three independent counters. W019 internal contradiction is a particularly strong cross-reference — the dome contradicts its own CONFIRMED claim using its own REFINED test.
